---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG]"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Examples:**
Please provide example links to the relevant Letterboxd pages. Please specify if the issue is specific to a single movie or every movie.

**System (please complete the following information):**
 - Browser [e.g. Chrome, Firefox, Edge]
 - Platform: [e.g. Desktop, Android]
 - Version [e.g. v3.18.1]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
